summary: ClashSolverMoveServiceIntoDetectedSpaceCommand — PDF "MOVE_SERVICE_INTO_SPACE". Single-service wrapper around the canonical space-aware move.
usecase: Solver step 3 move-into-space for a single service secondary.
notfor: Bulk moves — call in a loop if needed; each call is its own audit line.
precondition: Active document; one service element resolvable; has a default 3D view for raycasting.
postcondition: ElementTransformUtils.MoveElement inside the inner Transaction; tracker audit.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId required (Bot) OR single selection (Human).
2) Resolve element; WireError if not.
3) Instantiate PlacementMoveElementIntoDetectedSpaceCommand with one-element Resolver_ElementIds + optional threshold/step.
4) Delegate Execute; pipe its tracker outputs.
5) Tag tracker with delegated_to + solver context (Resolver_ClashId optional for audit linkage).

preprompts: Moving one service into detected space…
successprompts: Service move delegated; outcome in tracker outputs.
